description: Detects unused static functions and unreachable code in C. Simplified from Rust: flags all static function_definition nodes without identifier usage counting (cannot cross-reference from match_pattern alone) and flags statements after return/break/continue without CFG analysis. Languages scoped to c only.

flag.message: Static function detected -- verify it is referenced within this translation unit. Static functions not called anywhere in the file are dead code and should be removed.
